name: Bright Data
description: A platform providing proxy networks, web-scraping and rendering APIs, and data-collection products (proxies, Web Unlocker, Scraping Browser, LLM API).

auth_methods.note: Official docs describe API key authentication (used as a Bearer token in Authorization header), Native Access proxy credentials (username:password, i.e., basic-style proxy auth), and mention short-lived/other tokens in SDKs/tools.

credential_access.note: Pricing page states Bright Data offers a free trial credit at signup (immediate access without entering payment details). Combined with account setup docs showing a default API key is created on account signup, this supports self-serve free credential issuance. See account setup: https://docs.brightdata.com/getting-started/account-setup

api_surface.note: Documentation and API Reference Overview state Bright Data exposes REST endpoints for many products (Web Unlocker, Scraping Browser, Proxies, LLM API). Official product API pages list endpoints (e.g., POST https://api.brightdata.com/unlocker, proxies management endpoints).

buildability.note: Public REST docs exist and signup provides immediate/free-trial access and a default API key. Some networks/products may require payment details or KYC for full access (per account setup/pricing docs), but core APIs are accessible after signup.
